articles.title: Veteran broadcaster and radio anchor Jimmy Gil dies at 79
articles.description: Veteran broadcast journalist and radio anchor Jaime Federico Gil, popularly known as Jimmy Gil, passed away at the age of 79 on Thursday, June 11.
